skill.name: agile-design-doc
skill.description: 生成面向敏捷开发团队的精炼设计文档。MVP导向，避免过度设计。使用场景：(1) 需要为新功能或系统模块生成设计文档 (2) 需要明确功能边界和交互流程 (3) 需要提供实现思路和关键方法 (4) 需要阐述技术难点和解决方案。该skill会先分析项目技术栈和现有组件，然后生成精炼、重点突出的设计文档。
skill.summary: 生成面向敏捷开发团队的精炼设计文档。MVP导向，避免过度设计。使用场景：(1) 需要为新功能或系统模块生成设计文档 (2) 需要明确功能边界和交互流程 (3) 需要提供实现思路和关键方法 (4) 需要...
skill.author: AriesYB

security_audit.summary: Security audit completed. All 39 static findings are false positives. The skill contains only markdown documentation templates with example code blocks (Python, JSON, Mermaid diagrams). No actual code execution, cryptographic algorithms, or malicious patterns exist. This is a legitimate documentation generation skill for agile development teams.

high_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Detection
high_findings.description: Static analyzer incorrectly flagged YAML frontmatter fields as cryptographic code. Lines 2-3 contain name: and description: fields, not cryptographic algorithms.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: YAML frontmatter metadata - no cryptographic code present

high_findings.title: False Positive: High File Entropy Detection
high_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged YAML frontmatter delimiter as potential encrypted content. Line 1 contains standard --- markdown separator.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard YAML frontmatter delimiter, not encrypted content

medium_findings.title: False Positive: Ruby/Shell Backtick Execution
medium_findings.description: Static analyzer detected backticks and flagged as shell execution. These are markdown code fences used for syntax highlighting in documentation. No actual code execution occurs.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Markdown code fences for documentation examples, not shell commands

low_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged mermaid diagram definitions as system reconnaissance. These are standard sequence diagrams showing component interactions, not network scanning.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Mermaid sequence diagram syntax for documentation, not reconnaissance

content.value_statement: Development teams need concise design documents that align with MVP principles and avoid over-engineering. This skill generates focused, technical design documents with Mermaid diagrams, implementation details, and clear success criteria.
actual_capabilities: Analyze project tech stack from configuration files
Generate concise design documents with Mermaid sequence diagrams
Provide implementation code examples in Python, Java, or other languages
Identify technical challenges and propose solutions
Create data models and API interface definitions
limitations: Does not execute code or interact with running systems
Cannot access private repositories or protected resources
Relies on user-provided project context for accuracy
Generated code examples are illustrative, not production-ready

use_cases.title: Quick Design Sprint
use_cases.description: Rapidly generate a design document for a new feature during sprint planning

use_cases.title: Cross-Team Alignment
use_cases.description: Create standardized design documents that help backend, frontend, and QA teams understand requirements

use_cases.title: Technical Documentation
use_cases.description: Generate reference documentation for existing system modules

prompt_templates.title: New Feature Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a design document for a new [feature name] feature. The feature should [brief description]. Consider using [tech stack].
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new feature design from scratch

prompt_templates.title: API Design Document
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a design document for a REST API that handles [resource]. Include data models, endpoints, and sequence diagrams.
prompt_templates.scenario: Designing API endpoints for a new service

prompt_templates.title: Module Integration
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a design document showing how to integrate [new module] with the existing [existing system]. Show the interaction flow.

prompt_templates.title: Data Model Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design the data models and relationships for [domain area]. Include key entities, attributes, and how they interact.
prompt_templates.scenario: Defining database schema and object relationships

output_examples.input: Generate a design document for a user authentication feature in a Python Flask application
output: Key Features: Login, Register, Token Refresh
Mermaid sequence diagram showing auth flow

output_examples.input: Create a design doc for a payment processing module integration
output: Sequence diagram: Order -> Payment Gateway -> Callback

best_practices: Start by analyzing the existing tech stack from project configuration files
Focus on MVP scope - document core functionality first
Use Mermaid diagrams to visualize component interactions
Include code examples for critical implementation paths
anti_patterns: Adding unnecessary features that could be deferred to later iterations
Writing lengthy background explanations instead of focusing on implementation
Ignoring existing components and duplicating functionality
Including every possible edge case instead of focusing on happy paths

faq.question: What information should I provide for the best results?
faq.answer: Provide the feature name, its purpose, the project tech stack, and any existing components that should be reused.

faq.question: Can this skill generate code for any programming language?
faq.answer: The skill provides examples in Python, Java, JavaScript, and Go based on your project configuration.

faq.question: How detailed are the generated diagrams?
faq.answer: Mermaid sequence diagrams show the main component interactions. You can request more detailed diagrams as needed.

faq.question: Does this skill connect to external systems?
faq.answer: No, this skill only generates documentation text. It does not make network requests or execute code.

faq.question: Can I use this for legacy system documentation?
faq.answer: Yes, provide the existing system details and the skill will help document the current architecture.

faq.question: How do I refine the generated document?
faq.answer: Review the output and provide feedback. The skill can iterate on specific sections as needed.
